narrative:
Precinct Ashtabula 1-D (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 459 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.6 percentage points.
